name: PinBall Block Shooter
description: You know the rules! Use your flippers to launch the ball and smash as many blocks as possible in PinBall Block Shooter. Your goal is to keep the ball in play and rack up points while aiming for high scores. With a simple, classic design, intuitive two-button controls, and straightforward gameplay, this game is easy to pick up but hard to master. Perfect as a fun time killer, test your reflexes, stay in the game as long as possible, and enjoy the nostalgia of classic pinball action anytime!
instructions: Mouse click or tap to play
